metadata.description: Intent-Driven Financial Architecture (IDFA) plugin for Claude Code — build financial models that are human-readable, AI-operable, and audit-proof.

plugins.name: idfa-financial-architect
plugins.description: Apply the IDFA methodology to every financial modelling interaction — auto-activates on financial model tasks with four deterministic guardrails: Named Range Priority, LaTeX Verification, Intent Notes, and MCP Dependency.
